name: Inspect
description: Slow, deliberate examination — user is studying the interface. Camera stays still, letting the content speak.
when_to_use: Empty states, form fields, settings panels, initial context establishment

name: Compare
description: Side-by-side or toggle view — user evaluating options. Gentle drift maintains visual interest without competing with the content contrast.
when_to_use: Before/after states, feature comparisons, A/B views, theme toggles

name: Confirm
description: Brief hold showing completed action — user sees success. Subtle breathing motion communicates life and completion without distraction.
when_to_use: Success states, saved confirmations, upload completions, form submissions

name: Spotlight
description: Draw attention to a specific UI element. Camera pushes in to focus the viewer's eye on the interaction point.
when_to_use: User clicks, button interactions, cursor focus, highlighting a specific control

name: Reveal
description: Content appearing or expanding — the payoff moment. Camera pulls out to give newly appeared content room to breathe.
when_to_use: Data population, results appearing, panels expanding, content loading

name: Recap
description: Pull back to show full context after a detail view. Re-establishes the bigger picture after focused interaction.
when_to_use: Post-drilldown context recovery, closing sequences, returning to dashboard view
